## Source: amazon-inspector (81308c35c4cad5bf3f87f791133f9aff53485b715060135829785be1d33b2e1d)
The package gaia-marionette was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (089974c03f87b3fc8079752bb5a618804170e63bae873df64c8a1db931a92375)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'gaia-marionette' @ 1.0.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
